description: Get ready to travel the world with these Tyson shoes from rockport. Designed for continuous wear and superior walking comfort, these shoes are a great blend of form and function. Team these with cool casuals for weekend getaways or extended journeys.Upper Full grain leather uppers for greater support and stability Textile lining for superior comfort Elasticated sides for easy insertion and removal of the foot Moulded footbed for snug Fit Cushioned collar to prevent chafing and blisters Heel cup for sturdy support adidas adiPRENE® footbed is highly shock-absorbent and protects the heel at impact Strobel Construction® offers forefoot flexibility to aid the walking motion Midsole Polyurethane (PU) Midsole Offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Leather Midsole Outsole adidas adiPRENE® footbed gives superior cushioning and shock absorption to the heel on impact Rubber outsole provides a durable grip on a variety of surfaces Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
